positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical composition featuring bioluminescent flora and stylized cosmic elements. The central subject is a large, intricate mandala-style design incorporating glowing deep purple nebulae, stylized gold and copper filigree, and oversized, glowing abstract flowers. The style should be a blend of Art Deco geometry and magical realism, giving it a rich, tapestry-like feel. Strong use of contrasting deep space blacks and vibrant electric purples, teal, and glowing neon accents. The composition must feature a clean, recognizable silhouette suitable for apparel printing, with all elements perfectly layered. Intricate patterns should fill the space without becoming muddy. Cinematic, volumetric lighting, ultra-high contrast, vector illustration quality, designed for screen printing, centered and contained.
negative: artifacts, blur, text, watermarks, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy lines, out of focus, dirty, smudge, gradient noise, realistic photo, signature
